productName: Sour Grape MAX Chill (100mg THC;5mg CBN)
description: A boutique infused beverage with sweet, candy-like grape notes, a refreshing finish, and the kind of flavor that makes it feel like a treat before the effects even arrive. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest. Made to help you relax and find your calm.
